resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description:
If a 'global' file is specified as a 'file' by one job - subsequent jobs cannot override this source file to be an 'archive' (until the TT cleans up it's cache or a TT restart).
The other way around as well -> 'archive' to 'file'

In case of an accidental submission using the wrong type - some of the tasks for the second job will end up seeing the source file as an archive, others as a file.
fields.summary: Distributed Cache does not differentiate between file /archive for files with the same path

comments.body: Patch - changed the key used to differentiate between cache entries to consider whether the source is a file/archive
